overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through an industrial dock area with massive orange gantry cranes, transitioning from sunlit streets into the shadow of an elevated highway overpass. The scene features futuristic urban industrial architecture with shipping containers, concrete infrastructure, and sparse pedestrian activity during morning hours.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront street with green bike lane

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green allowing passage
character maintains steady walking pace along the designated bike lane

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the green bike lane toward the intersection, approaching the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction along the bike path

entered.detail: massive orange industrial gantry cranes towering over the dock area
multi-level concrete highway overpass structure running parallel to the street
tall traffic signal pole with multiple lights at the intersection
stacked industrial shipping containers near the crane structures
modern street lighting pole with horizontal LED array

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit industrial street with a distinctive green bike lane, approaching an intersection. Massive orange gantry cranes dominate the left skyline while an elevated highway runs along the right. The traffic light changes from red to green as the character moves forward through the open waterfront area.

events.description: character crosses the intersection alongside other pedestrians
character turns right toward the elevated highway underpass

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection among pedestrians then turning right toward the overpass entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow shirt crossing the street in the same direction
dark colored car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large digital billboard with colorful advertisement display
green street sign with white text reading Miner
large industrial building with roll-up garage doors

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the busy intersection among other pedestrians, passing a large digital billboard. After crossing, the character turns right toward the elevated highway, moving closer to the massive concrete structure as the orange gantry cranes loom larger on the left and the environment becomes more industrial.

events.description: entering the deep shadow cast by the elevated highway overpass
transitioning from open sky to fully covered underpass environment

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered area beneath the highway overpass where lighting dims significantly

notable_agents.action: black truck parked near the industrial garage building

entered.detail: massive concrete support pillars holding up the highway structure
concrete industrial building with numbered garage doors and air conditioning units
derelict teal-colored vintage car parked on the roadside

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadow beneath the massive elevated highway, where the lighting shifts dramatically from bright sunlight to dim, diffused light. Concrete pillars line the right side while industrial garage buildings appear on the left, with abandoned vehicles scattered along the roadside beneath the overhead concrete structure.

events.description: lighting becomes progressively darker deeper under the overpass with artificial lights becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dark underpass toward the distant light visible at the tunnel exit

entered.detail: concrete wall covered with white graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: Deep beneath the highway overpass, the environment becomes dark and enclosed with graffiti-covered walls and sparse artificial lighting from overhead lamps. The character walks toward a distant bright exit as the concrete infrastructure creates a tunnel-like atmosphere with debris scattered along the roadside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunlit industrial waterfront into the oppressive, dim shadows of a massive highway overpass. It begins with the character walking along a street featuring a green bike lane, moving past towering orange gantry cranes as a traffic light shifts to green. As the character crosses a busy intersection and passes a digital billboard, the camera turns right, drawing closer to the looming concrete infrastructure of the elevated highway. The scene then shifts dramatically as the character enters the shadow of the overpass, where bright sunlight gives way to diffused light, concrete pillars, and abandoned vehicles. Finally, the environment becomes dark and enclosed, moving through a tunnel-like space of graffiti-covered walls and sparse artificial lighting toward a distant, bright exit.
